title: taraxacum campylodes
intro: Taraxacum campylodes, also known as the variable dandelion, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum campylodes include its ability to support liver and kidney function, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Taraxacum campylodes can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal supplements to promote overall well-being.
